steps.title: Check each table against the ranges
steps.content:
• A) $(-5,6)$: need $3 < 6 < 6$, but $6 < 6$ fails. Eliminate.
  • B) $(-5,4)$: $3 < 4 < 6$ ✓; $(-6,10)$: $6 < 10 < 11$ ✓; $(-8,19)$: $12 < 19 < 21$ ✓. All match.
  • C) $(-5,2)$: need $3 < 2$, fails. Eliminate.
  • D) $(-5,1)$: need $3 < 1$, fails. Eliminate.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
